# HydroWild

> HydroWild makes science-backed, zero-sugar, zero-dye hydration drinks for kids and teens — 9 vitamins and electrolytes in four wild flavors, made in the USA. Founded in 2022 by CJ and Lindey Britton in Birmingham, Alabama.

## About
- Founded: 2022, by CJ and Lindey Britton
- Based in: Birmingham, Alabama, USA
- Product: powdered stick-pack hydration drink mix for kids and teens
- Sweetener: stevia — zero sugar, zero artificial sweeteners
- Contains: 9 vitamins and electrolytes, including potassium and magnesium
- Free of: added sugar, artificial dyes, artificial ingredients
- Made in: USA
- Contact: support@hydrowild.com

## Flavors
- Blue Raspberry — mascot Yukon the Yeti
- Watermelon — mascot Zara the Wampus Cat
- Strawberry Lemonade — mascots Chessie & Nessie
- Fruit Punch — mascot The Lil Kraken
- Wild Variety Pack — all four flavors, 32 stick packs

## Key pages
- [Home](https://hydrowild.com/): Brand overview, flavors, and story.
- [Shop](https://hydrowild.com/shop.html): All flavors and the Wild Variety Pack.
- [The Science / Ingredients](https://hydrowild.com/ingredients.html): What is inside and why.
- [Our Story](https://hydrowild.com/story.html): How and why HydroWild started.
- [Blog](https://hydrowild.com/blog.html): Hydration tips and brand updates.
- [Contact](https://hydrowild.com/contact.html): Email, wholesale, and press.

## FAQ
- What sweetener does HydroWild use? Stevia — zero sugar and zero artificial sweeteners.
- How many vitamins and electrolytes are in each pack? 9, including potassium and magnesium.
- Who founded HydroWild? CJ and Lindey Britton, in 2022, in Birmingham, Alabama.
- Where is it made? In the USA.
